gist.headline: Fresh ink on the front page
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot companion updating a giant billboard or book while the bee watches, representing the automated README update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head painting a new page in a giant book, while the bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny paintbrush. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head painting a new page in a giant book, while the bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny paintbrush.
